Email #2 - Stomper Launch 2.0: huge commissions coming...



-- begin copy --

SUBJECT: Stomper Launch 2.0: huge commissions coming...


NAME,

Hey... Andy Jenkins here.

I have some big news, but I want to
keep this email pretty simple... so here's
the bottom line:

We have another huge launch coming. 

And just like last time, we're going to 
be paying out MILLIONS in commissions.

And we would love to have you onboard so we
can send YOU a big fat check.

This is going to be another "stop the
Internet" launch... and we aren't messing around... 

- We already have FANTASTIC
"move-the-free-line" content, and more is 
being created as I type this.

- We have our faculty fully prepped and ready,
and all the Stomper resources are standing 
by.

- We've even hired Jeff Walker to run the
launch and create the email copy.

- AND... and we have some amazing new viral
technology for you so you can host our
pre-launch content on your site (if you want). 

BOTTOM LINE: this thing is going to rock, and
we're going to be sending out crazy affiliate
commissions.

On Friday I'm going to send you all the
details, and you can start emailing as soon
as you hear from us.

In the meantime, you can see our first
pre-launch video here:

http://


best regards,
Andy

P.S. watch out for the details and your
affiliate link on Friday... and you'll be 
able to start mailing immediately.


--- end copy ---
